tagline: Skin-health-first aesthetics from a registered nurse with 25 years behind her.
seoDescription: SoCo Aesthetics is a Petaluma medical spa led by Donna Davis, a registered nurse of 25 years and esthetician — chemical peels, acne care, microchanneling, and skin rejuvenation by appointment.
heroSubheading: Led by Donna Davis — a registered nurse of 25 years and esthetician — SoCo Aesthetics focuses on real skin health: custom chemical peels, acne care, microchanneling, and rejuvenation, one client at a time.
highlights: Licensed registered nurse with 25 years of clinical experience
Esthetician specializing in chemical peels, acne care & microchanneling
Treatments tailored to your skin, not a fixed menu
North McDowell, Petaluma — serving Sonoma County
aboutBody: SoCo Aesthetics is the work of Donna Davis, a registered nurse of 25 years and an esthetician who brings a clinical, skin-health-first mindset to medical aesthetics. The studio sits at North McDowell Boulevard in Petaluma, serving clients across Sonoma County by appointment.

Rather than push a fixed menu, Donna builds each plan around the client in the chair — whether that's calming active acne, resurfacing with a custom chemical peel, or stimulating collagen with microchanneling. The result is unhurried, one-on-one care focused on healthy, resilient skin over time.

services.title: Custom Chemical Peels
services.description: Peels matched to your skin type and goals to improve tone, texture, and clarity.

services.title: Acne Care Programs
services.description: Targeted treatment plans that calm active breakouts and support clearer skin over time.

services.title: Microchanneling
services.description: Collagen-induction microchanneling that smooths texture and refreshes tired skin.

services.title: Signature Facials & Dermaplaning
services.description: Deep-cleansing facials and dermaplaning for an immediate, healthy glow.

services.title: Skin Rejuvenation
services.description: Rejuvenating treatments for aging and sun-affected skin, planned around your goals.
